# Ernest Of Gaia — AI Coaching

Ernest Of Gaia is a local AI coaching business. A human-centered approach
to AI: personalized 1-on-1 coaching for your home, hobby, or business.
Plain English, no jargon, no hype. Serving Pacific City to Portland,
Oregon & the I-5 Corridor. Online coaching available anywhere.

Tagline: "AI for your Home, Hobby, or Business"

## Contact
- Text (preferred): 503-664-0546 — send "AI coaching" to start
- Email: eog@ernestofgaia.xyz
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/ernestofgaia
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@ErnestOfGaia
- Website: https://ernestofgaia.xyz
- Machine-readable data: https://ernestofgaia.xyz/api/begin-learning
- Response within 48 hours of first message

## Services
- Tier 0: Free Handshake Call (30 min, online, no commitment)
- Tier 1: Foundations — AI Starter ($75/session, 60 min, for beginners)
- Tier 2: The Builder ($110/session, 75 min — real workflows, tested before you rely on them)
- Last Mile Website Development — finishing service for websites that are
  80-90% done (broken forms, placeholder copy, missing SEO, mobile bugs).
  Free audit, flat quote, no lock-in. For Oregon small businesses.
  https://ernestofgaia.xyz/begin-learning/services/last-mile

Coaching focuses on Claude and ChatGPT — learning one tool well over
sampling everything. Google AI tools available for Google-savvy clients.
Certification course tutoring available (Anthropic Academy endorsed;
OpenAI and Google AI tracks supported).

## Coaching Plans
- Pay as you go (flexible, no commitment)
- Habit Plan: 3 months, typically weekly
- Rhythm Plan: 6 months, typically weekly, 5% off
- Craft Plan: 9 months, typically weekly, 10% off

## Nonprofit Giveback Program
Every 12 hours of paid coaching earns one free AI coaching session for a
nonprofit of the client's choice — in person or online, not limited to
Oregon. Clients without a nonprofit in mind can direct their hours to
Team Rubicon (https://teamrubiconusa.org/), where Ernest has volunteered
as a Grey Shirt for a decade.

## Project Gallery
mechanicalcupcakes.fun — working gallery of website builds and mini apps.
Its resident agent, Hoot, explains the web-development principles behind
each one.

## Service Area
Pacific City, Oregon to Portland Metro & the I-5 Corridor. Online
coaching available anywhere.

## CTA
Text "AI coaching" to 503-664-0546 for a free 30-minute call.
